arts.ttl: Bernal's injury recovery going 'full steam ahead'
arts.sum: Marc Bernal is continuing his long recovery process from ACL surgery but the good news is that he is making excellent progress. Mundo Deportivo have an update on the midfielder and says his “recovery is going full steam ahead” and they hope he will soon start training on the grass again.

arts.ttl: Rashford hopeful of Barca move - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is hopeful of joining Barcelona this summer, Atletico Madrid are keen on Crystal Palace's Jean-Philippe Mateta, while Manchester City see Charles de Ketelaere as Kevin de Bruyne's replacement.

arts.ttl: Papers: Man Utd forward Rashford still targeting Barcelona move
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Long-time Barcelona injury absentee returns to the grass for training
arts.sum: Barcelona star Marc-André ter Stegen on Saturday took a significant step forward in his recovery injury. This comes amid confirmation that the 32-year-old has been given the green light to…

arts.ttl: Chelsea ‘could offer €100m’ for Barcelona star this summer
arts.sum: A member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona could be the subject of a mammoth transfer offer on the part of Chelsea this summer. That’s according to…

arts.ttl: Barcelona midfielder has the best dribble success rate in La Liga this season
arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at Barcelona is leading all La Liga players when it comes to dribble success rate across the season to date. That’s according to statisticians…

arts.ttl: Barcelona Transfer News: Inigo Martinez deal blocked as financial problems continue
arts.sum: Barcelona are unable to hand Inigo Martinez a new contract because they have once again reached their salary cap, according to Spanish media. However, LaLiga's stringent financial rules, particularly the salary cap of Spain's top flight, are once more causing Barcelona trouble.
